snippet.title: iPhone 17 Full Review - Don't be Fool 🥲
snippet.description:
It's been one month and seven days since the iPhone 17 became my primary phone. I've pushed the new features to the limit, and it’s time for the full, honest, long-term review! 

Apple finally gave the base model what we've been asking for: the 120Hz ProMotion display, the lightning-fast A19 chip, and significant camera upgrades (including a vastly improved low-light performance). 

I cover the iOS 26 experience, battery degradation after a month of fast charging, how the new size feels long-term, and whether it holds up better than the Pro models for most users. Is this finally the 'standard' iPhone that feels 'Pro'? Watch to find out! 

#iPhone17 #OneMonthReview #Apple #iPhoneReview #iOS26 #ProMotion #A19Chip #TechReview #AppleEcosystem #BestiPhone

snippet.title: Blackmagic App Settings for iPhone 17 Pro in 60-Seconds | Phantom LUTs
snippet.description:
Purchase LUTs https://www.joelfamularo.com/colour-apple

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/phantomluts/

Here are the recommended Blackmagic App settings to get you started shooting with Phantom LUTs on your iPhone 17 Pro using the latest version of the Blackmagic Camera App (V3.0+) on iOS.

There are two essential settings to note; the first in the 'Record' sub-menu is, Colour Space: Apple Log - HDR. The second in the LUTs sub-menu is, Colour Space Tag: Rec.709.

It is important to set the correct settings before you start, otherwise you may run into issues when applying LUTs to your footage later on.
